description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a low, angular chassis with a predominantly black exterior adorned with yellow, red, and white markings and symbols. The vehicle is equipped with multiple large-caliber cannons mounted on both the front and sides, as well as a central rotating turret with additional weaponry. Its body is wide and flat, with extended side panels and reinforced armor plating visible across the entire structure. The surface is decorated with various geometric and symbolic designs, including arrows, circles, and stylized emblems, giving it a distinctive, intimidating appearance. There are no visible wheels or tracks, suggesting a hover or anti-gravity propulsion system. The vehicle's design emphasizes heavy armament, strong defensive features, and a visually striking paint scheme.
description: A heavily armored, black combat vehicle with multiple cannons, a central turret, and bold yellow and red markings. Its angular, wide body is covered in reinforced plating and symbolic designs.
description_view_0: Side-angled view showing the central turret, multiple cannons, and extensive yellow markings along the side panels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual front cannons, angular nose, and prominent yellow and white decorative elements.
description_view_2: Opposite side-angled view displaying the turret, side cannons, and additional red and yellow symbols.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back-mounted components, exhausts, and rear-facing weaponry, with visible red highlights.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Six visible weapon mounts: two large cannons at the front, two side-mounted cannons, and two on the central rotating turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced panels on the front, sides, and turret; sloped surfaces for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid black base with bold yellow, red, and white geometric and symbolic designs; no traditional camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: Multiple stylized symbols and emblems in yellow, red, and white on the sides, turret, and rear; includes arrows, circles, and abstract insignia.
